Video.summary: Married couple Jovan and Rosalyn feud over a shredded sofa, a broken TV and a dead plant.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Johnson

Video.summary: Exes Caerya and James meet in court to settle a three-year debate over their son's paternity.
Video.title: Cox vs. Carswell

Video.summary: Deputy Braafladt attempts to find the man responsible for giving his girlfriend a black eye. A woman is arrested behind a closed business in the middle of the night.
Video.title: Abusing and Abusers

Video.summary: Nancy Moses Hill sues Tracy Jordan for $5,000, claiming Tracy kept too much money from selling her family's antiques. Tracy argues she followed the contract and paid what was due. Nancy insists her elderly mother’s cherished items were undervalued.
Video.title: Antique Ambush

Video.summary: Edward Grice sues ex-girlfriend Denise Beard for $5,000 after she crashed a car he leased for her, pocketed the insurance payout, and left him to cover repairs. Denise claims the check was stolen and Edward acted on his own to pay for repairs.
Video.title: Insurance Fraud

Video.summary: Plaintiff Brenda claims her neighbor's pit bull attacked her dog and bit her, causing $4,643 in damages. Defendant Christine denies liability, stating the dogs aren’t hers and Brenda’s gate was open.
Video.title: Devastated by a Dog Attack

Video.summary: Corina broke up with Anthony after choking her but after finding out she's pregnant, sues for child support.
Video.title: Get It On Record

Video.summary: Jessica is suing her ex-boyfriend, stating he attacked her after accusing her of sleeping with his cousin.
Video.title: You're Just Toxic

Video.summary: The claws come out when two sisters slug it out. When the bombshells drop the emotions fly.
Video.title: Sisters Slug it Out

Video.summary: With help from a compatibility expert, the judges advise longtime couple Erica and Turk on family and finances.
Video.title: Virgil vs. Virgil Jr.

Video.summary: A broken cellphone after a heated argument has a Texas couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Oliver vs. Boyce

Video.summary: Past infidelity and the discovery of a homoerotic dating profile have husband and wife Laffiama and Amy feuding in court.
Video.title: Murillo vs. Murillo

Video.summary: A woman crashed her sister's car during a snowstorm, and her sister wants payment.
Video.title: Hey Sis! You Trashed My Car and Trashed Our Bond!

Image.alt: Hey Sis! You Trashed My Car and Trashed Our Bond!
Hey Sis! You Trashed My Car and Trashed Our Bond!
Hey Sis! You Trashed My Car and Trashed Our Bond!

Video.summary: Linda says John wrote an IOU for his DUI but he said he was drunk during signing.
Video.title: Too Sauced to Sign

Video.summary: BFFs Earl and Demoun brawl over stolen sushi. But when Demoun put away his fist, he took out his hammer!
Video.title: Fish and Hammer

Video.summary: Plaintiff Eva Aleman sues Nicholas Satriano after his pit bull killed her Yorkie, alleging he reneged on promises to cover cremation costs and replace her dog. Nicholas claims her dog was loose and provoked the fight.
Video.title: Your Dog Killed My Dog!

Video.summary: Sarah sues her ex-husband for rent, saying their marriage fell apart due to trust issues and infidelity.
Video.title: Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads

Image.alt: Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads
Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads
Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads

Video.summary: A battle over co-parenting takes a twist as Rico pushes for a second chance, but Alyssa intends to stand firm.
Video.title: Lopez vs. Widmer

Video.summary: A surprise witness and a bombshell reveal blow the lid off Joshua's property-damage claim against girlfriend Tonya.
Video.title: Brown vs. Bell

Video.summary: A grieving grandmother demands a paternity test to uncover the truth about her late son's mysterious child.
Video.title: Moultry vs. Portuonio

Video.summary: WENET and the SED demonstrate a large scale marijuana bust near an elementary school.
Video.title: Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard

Image.alt: Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard
Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard
Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard

Video.summary: Deputy Brady searches for a man wanted for felonious assault and domestic violence.
Video.title: You Can Run but You Can Not Hide

Image.alt: You Can Run but You Can Not Hide
You Can Run but You Can Not Hide
You Can Run but You Can Not Hide

Video.summary: Deputies save a dog trapped in a vehicle parked in the sun.
Video.title: The Car Driver

Video.summary: Deputy Payne responds to a vehicle on fire with a teenager trapped inside.
Video.title: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

Image.alt: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves
Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves
Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

Video.summary: A dangerous fugitive is wanted for assult and battery. A deputy stops and unregistrered vehicle. A look at the daily procedures deputies must follow before going on patrol.
Video.title: The Man in the Van

Video.summary: WENET plans and executes a large Methamphetamine cartel raid.
Video.title: Mexican Cartel Meth House

Video.summary: Bunny and Benny need Judge Lynn's advice. One wants recompense from the other due to a failed experiment.
Video.title: You're No Einstein

Video.summary: A baby mama and grandma clash over who fathered the baby boy!
Video.title: Baby Mama Drama

Video.summary: Kimberly Arson claims that her cousin skipped out on rent to spend it on gambling money, cars and wigs. Charmel says the rent deal changed the day she became Kimberly's glorified nanny.
Video.title: My Freeloading Cousin Is Wigging Out!

Image.alt: My Freeloading Cousin Is Wigging Out!
My Freeloading Cousin Is Wigging Out!
My Freeloading Cousin Is Wigging Out!

Video.summary: Laura is suing her ex-friend and workmate for a loan. Caylee says Laura offered money without any obligations!
Video.title: The Devil's in the Details

Video.summary: Two siblings go toe to toe and tell different stories. Reuinted after years apart, the battle begins again.
Video.title: He Said She Said

Video.summary: Yuri she said Bryan promised her a big bucks photobook, but when her it failed, their party petered out.
Video.title: The Party is Over

Video.summary: Llewellyn Clark sues ex-girlfriend Tyronica Munn for $1,400, claiming she stole it after a fight. Tyronica says she spent it on a hotel, champagne, and a massage, asserting the money was owed since Llewellyn freeloaded in her apartment.
Video.title: Ex Spending Spree

Video.summary: Plaintiff Diane Hernandez sues stylist Nikki Banks for $2,175, saying hair extensions caused scalp damage. Nikki denies fault, blaming Diane for wetting the tape. Nikki countersues for $500, citing defamation and a drop in her social media rating.
Video.title: Hair Extension Disaster

Video.summary: Marva Utley sues Ed’s bakery for $1,500 after receiving a red velvet cake instead of the rum cake she ordered for her daughter's birthday. Ed claims it was a mix-up by a new employee and offered a refund, but Marva says the mistake ruined the party.
Video.title: Cake Catastrophe

Video.summary: Chenelle Dawson sues Alcie Shaw for $5,000, claiming a botched dreadlock job caused pain and ruined her hair. Alcie denies wrongdoing, stating she explained her method and the plaintiff never complained.
Video.title: Dreadlock Disaster

Video.summary: A woman says the defendant began cheating on her after she got pregnant with his child; she sues him for unpaid child support; the defendant claims he has fallen on hard times since the pandemic.
Video.title: Broken Promises, Unpaid Dues

Video.summary: Plaintiff rented a room from the defendant; he's suing for the return of his security deposit.
Video.title: Room for Rent

Video.summary: Anastasia is a hair stylist here to sue one of her clients for an unpaid loan and emotional distress.
Video.title: Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan

Image.alt: Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan
Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan
Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan

Video.summary: Ashley is suing her former friend Terra, for not returning her dog after caring for it while she was in rehab.
Video.title: Tearful Canine Custody Battle

Video.summary: Andrew is suing Rachel after buying a lemon car due to her distracting him by dressing provacatively.
Video.title: Car Sale Gone Sour

Video.summary: Paulita is suing her baby daddy for the value of a car, saying she left him because he's an abusive drunk.
Video.title: Paying Up for the Car

Video.summary: The Cutlers' compatibility test helps Victor and Keisha settle a dispute over ugly women in the bedroom.
Video.title: Leaks vs. Holley

Video.summary: Sexual frustrations and a gambling addiction threaten Drew and Aubrey's 16-year relationship as they battle for reconciliation.
Video.title: York-Ketner vs. Ketner

Video.summary: Terrell sues girlfriend Kristy for damages because he suspects she is using him for money.
Video.title: Marrow vs. Coleman
